title: Install the worktree-domains proxy + route registry
description: Write the worktree-domains CLI + its self-contained Node reverse proxy into tools/worktree-domains/ and register the workspace Nx project `worktree-domains` (list|reconcile|status|logs|stop). Workspace-level and always-on — no inputs. Idempotent and --repair-safe: every generator-owned file is rewritten on each run.
